item.title: Another One (Or 5) Bites The Dust: Cadwalader Litigation Leaders Exit Amid Hogan Lovells Merger Fallout
Would You Have Voted For Trump If You’d Seen This Future?
item.description: Was your wildest imagination wild enough?

item.title: Eli Lilly Expands Its In Vivo Ambitions, Acquiring Cell Therapy Startup Orna for up to $2.4B
item.description: Lilly is the latest pharma company to use M&A to enter this growing field, following deals made in the past year by AstraZeneca, AbbVie, Gilead Scienc...

item.title: Pentagon Needs More Time to Finalize Defense Firms on Naughty List After Initial Review
item.description: Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth had until Feb. 6 to review contractor performance under an executive order issued last month.

item.title: We're In The Epstein Files, Let Us Explain…
item.description: ... how contemptuous the Justice Department's production really is.
